name: spec-boundary-harness
description: Heterogeneous LLM cross-validation for feature planning. Claude analyzes inputs and writes 11 boundary contracts; Codex re-reads everything in --sandbox read-only and validates in one pass; Claude triages findings and applies safe fixes.

external.name: codex
external.description: Codex CLI is required for the Phase 2 read-only validator. Without it, Phase 1 still runs but validation is skipped.
